zh.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France: 法國利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯
zh.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy III de Limoges於大約1157年出生在法國利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯時，他的父親Adhémar V Boson de Limoges24歲，母親Sarah de Dunstanville21歲。他於大約1210年與Ermengarde de Barry結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年3月29日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年74歲，埋葬在法國利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯。

zh-hans.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France: 法国利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯
zh-hans.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy III de Limoges于大约1157年出生在法国利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯时，他的父亲Adhémar V Boson de Limoges24岁，母亲Sarah de Dunstanville21岁。他于大约1210年与Ermengarde de Barry结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年3月29日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年74岁，埋葬在法国利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limoges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Fernand, Gaston, Jacques, Monique, Muguette, Pierre, Rosaire.
French: habitational name from the city of Limoges and of several other places in the southwestern part of France.
History: Pierre Amand dit Jolicoeur and Limoges from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Catherine Grenier in Montreal, QC, in 1698.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy III de Limoges was born about 1157, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, his father, Adhémar V Boson de Limoges, was 24 and his mother, Sarah de Dunstanville, was 21. He married Ermengarde de Barry about 1210. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 March 1230, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 74, and was buried in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy III de Limoges est né environ 1157, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, son père, Adhémar V Boson de Limoges, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Dunstanville, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde de Barry environ 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1230, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy III de Limoges um 1157 in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adhémar V Boson de Limoges 24 und seine Mutter Sarah de Dunstanville 21. Er hat um 1210 Ermengarde de Barry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. März 1230 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy III de Limoges è nato il circa 1157 nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, il suo padre, Adhémar V Boson de Limoges, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Sarah de Dunstanville, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde de Barry circa 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 marzo 1230, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia.

ja.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France: フランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.lifeSummary: Guy III de Limogesが約1157年にフランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで生まれた時，父Adhémar V Boson de Limogesは24歳，母Sarah de Dunstanvilleは21歳であった。約1210年にErmengarde de Barryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年3月29日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで74歳で死去し，フランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy III de Limoges(이)가 대략 1157년 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 리모그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adhémar V Boson de Limoges(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Dunstanville(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1210년 Ermengarde de Barry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 3월 29일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 리모그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy III de Limoges nasceu aproximadamente 1157, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França, seu pai, Adhémar V Boson de Limoges, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Dunstanville, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde de Barry aproximadamente 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1230, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy III de Limoges родился около 1157 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция, его отцу по имени Adhémar V Boson de Limoges было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Dunstanville, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde de Barry около 1210 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 марта 1230 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy III de Limoges nació aproximadamente 1157, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, su papá, Adhémar V Boson de Limoges, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sarah de Dunstanville, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ermengarde de Barry aproximadamente 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1230, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia.
